_note: This file lives in S3 at config/settings.json. Streamlit reads and writes it. Scanner pulls it on every cycle. Changes active within SCAN_INTERVAL_SECS. Do not edit manually in production — use the Streamlit settings UI at :8501.

cloud._note_provider: Options: aws | gcp | azure — drives which providers/ adapter loads

storage._note: All paths relative to ocsf_bucket. Set bucket name before first run.

scanner._note_lookback: On first boot only. How far back to scan before cursor is set.

matching._note: CSVs pulled from S3 on every scan cycle. Edit in S3 or via Streamlit UI.

alerts._note_dedup: One alert per source IP per provider per dedup_window_minutes. Prevents alert floods.
alerts._note_loganalyzer: LogAnalyzer called on-demand from Grafana. Not from scanner. Leave blank if not using.

identity_center._note: Set store_id from AWS Identity Center console. Enable if SSO is configured.

active_directory._note: Optional. Enable if Identity Center not available.

nac_csv._note: Fallback. Upload IP to MAC to user mapping CSV to identity/ prefix in S3.

crowdstrike._note: When false, Grafana dashboards show endpoint visibility banner. Network-layer detection still active.

performance._note_s3_select: Push filtering to S3. Never load full files into memory. Keep enabled.
performance._note_polars: Polars MIT license. Lazy evaluation. Memory stays under 200MB.

reporting._note: PDF generated on-demand via Grafana button. Weekly scheduled report optional.

dashboards._note_dns: Option B: two internal DNS entries. Update to match your environment.

_meta._note: last_written_by and last_written_at updated by Streamlit on every save.

code_analyser._note: Gemma 4 E4B Q4_K_M. Runs on EC2 only. Never on edge device.

git_hook._note: Pre-commit hook ships diffs to S3. Installed by MDM scripts.

file_watcher._note: watchdog-based file system watcher on managed devices.

marauder_scan._note: Marauder Scan detects AI framework, MCP and agent usage in source code.
